name: insurance adjusters processing 10–20 claims/week tool
description: For insurance adjusters processing 10–20 claims/week, lack of timely updates causes workflow inefficiencies. We generate weekly claims status summaries instead of manual tracking through emails and spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Lack of timely updates on claims status leads to inefficient workflow.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Lack of timely updates on claims status leads to inefficient workflow.

locked_fields.current_alternative: manual tracking of claims status through emails and spreadsheets
